series_metadata.series_description: Investigations by the Inspector General pertaining to ODI.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: In office 1 year after file closed; if litigation is involved, in office until all possible litigation is exhausted; then destroy. ; Electronic: In office 1 year after file closed; if litigation is involved, in office until all possible litigation is exhausted; then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
